<?php

// This is a autogenerated file:User

class User {
    private int $id; // json:id Required
    private string $name; // json:name Required
    private string $email; // json:email Required
    private array $roles; // json:roles Required
    private Profile $profile; // json:profile Required

    /**
     * @param int $id
     * @param string $name
     * @param string $email
     * @param array $roles
     * @param Profile $profile
     */
    public function __construct(int $id, string $name, string $email, array $roles, Profile $profile) {
        $this->id = $id;
        $this->name = $name;
        $this->email = $email;
        $this->roles = $roles;
        $this->profile = $profile;
    }

    /**
     * @param int $value
     * @throws Exception
     * @return int
     */
    public static function fromID(int $value): int {
        return $value; /*int*/
    }

    /**
     * @throws Exception
     * @return int
     */
    public function toID(): int {
        if (User::validateID($this->id))  {
            return $this->id; /*int*/
        }
        throw new Exception('never get to this User::id');
    }

    /**
     * @param int
     * @return bool
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public static function validateID(int $value): bool {
        if (!is_integer($value)) {
            throw new Exception("Attribute Error:User::id");
        }
        return true;
    }

    /**
     * @throws Exception
     * @return int
     */
    public function getID(): int {
        if (User::validateID($this->id))  {
            return $this->id;
        }
        throw new Exception('never get to getID User::id');
    }

    /**
     * @return int
     */
    public static function sampleID(): int {
        return 31; /*31:id*/
    }

    /**
     * @param string $value
     * @throws Exception
     * @return string
     */
    public static function fromName(string $value): string {
        return $value; /*string*/
    }

    /**
     * @throws Exception
     * @return string
     */
    public function toName(): string {
        if (User::validateName($this->name))  {
            return $this->name; /*string*/
        }
        throw new Exception('never get to this User::name');
    }

    /**
     * @param string
     * @return bool
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public static function validateName(string $value): bool {
        if (!is_string($value)) {
            throw new Exception("Attribute Error:User::name");
        }
        return true;
    }

    /**
     * @throws Exception
     * @return string
     */
    public function getName(): string {
        if (User::validateName($this->name))  {
            return $this->name;
        }
        throw new Exception('never get to getName User::name');
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public static function sampleName(): string {
        return 'User::name::32'; /*32:name*/
    }

    /**
     * @param string $value
     * @throws Exception
     * @return string
     */
    public static function fromEmail(string $value): string {
        return $value; /*string*/
    }

    /**
     * @throws Exception
     * @return string
     */
    public function toEmail(): string {
        if (User::validateEmail($this->email))  {
            return $this->email; /*string*/
        }
        throw new Exception('never get to this User::email');
    }

    /**
     * @param string
     * @return bool
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public static function validateEmail(string $value): bool {
        if (!is_string($value)) {
            throw new Exception("Attribute Error:User::email");
        }
        return true;
    }

    /**
     * @throws Exception
     * @return string
     */
    public function getEmail(): string {
        if (User::validateEmail($this->email))  {
            return $this->email;
        }
        throw new Exception('never get to getEmail User::email');
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public static function sampleEmail(): string {
        return 'User::email::33'; /*33:email*/
    }

    /**
     * @param array $value
     * @throws Exception
     * @return array
     */
    public static function fromRoles(array $value): array {
        return  array_map(function ($value) {
            return $value; /*string*/
        }, $value);
    }

    /**
     * @throws Exception
     * @return array
     */
    public function toRoles(): array {
        if (User::validateRoles($this->roles))  {
            return array_map(function ($value) {
                return $value; /*string*/
            }, $this->roles);
        }
        throw new Exception('never get to this User::roles');
    }

    /**
     * @param array
     * @return bool
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public static function validateRoles(array $value): bool {
        if (!is_array($value)) {
            throw new Exception("Attribute Error:User::roles");
        }
        array_walk($value, function($value_v) {
            if (!is_string($value_v)) {
                throw new Exception("Attribute Error:User::roles");
            }
        });
        return true;
    }

    /**
     * @throws Exception
     * @return array
     */
    public function getRoles(): array {
        if (User::validateRoles($this->roles))  {
            return $this->roles;
        }
        throw new Exception('never get to getRoles User::roles');
    }

    /**
     * @return array
     */
    public static function sampleRoles(): array {
        return  array(
            'User::::34' /*34:*/
        ); /* 34:roles*/
    }

    /**
     * @param stdClass $value
     * @throws Exception
     * @return Profile
     */
    public static function fromProfile(stdClass $value): Profile {
        return Profile::from($value); /*class*/
    }

    /**
     * @throws Exception
     * @return stdClass
     */
    public function toProfile(): stdClass {
        if (User::validateProfile($this->profile))  {
            return $this->profile->to(); /*class*/
        }
        throw new Exception('never get to this User::profile');
    }

    /**
     * @param Profile
     * @return bool
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public static function validateProfile(Profile $value): bool {
        $value->validate();
        return true;
    }

    /**
     * @throws Exception
     * @return Profile
     */
    public function getProfile(): Profile {
        if (User::validateProfile($this->profile))  {
            return $this->profile;
        }
        throw new Exception('never get to getProfile User::profile');
    }

    /**
     * @return Profile
     */
    public static function sampleProfile(): Profile {
        return Profile::sample(); /*35:profile*/
    }

    /**
     * @throws Exception
     * @return bool
     */
    public function validate(): bool {
        return User::validateID($this->id)
        || User::validateName($this->name)
        || User::validateEmail($this->email)
        || User::validateRoles($this->roles)
        || User::validateProfile($this->profile);
    }

    /**
     * @return stdClass
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public function to(): stdClass  {
        $out = new stdClass();
        $out->{'id'} = $this->toID();
        $out->{'name'} = $this->toName();
        $out->{'email'} = $this->toEmail();
        $out->{'roles'} = $this->toRoles();
        $out->{'profile'} = $this->toProfile();
        return $out;
    }

    /**
     * @param stdClass $obj
     * @return User
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public static function from(stdClass $obj): User {
        return new User(
         User::fromID($obj->{'id'})
        ,User::fromName($obj->{'name'})
        ,User::fromEmail($obj->{'email'})
        ,User::fromRoles($obj->{'roles'})
        ,User::fromProfile($obj->{'profile'})
        );
    }

    /**
     * @return User
     */
    public static function sample(): User {
        return new User(
         User::sampleID()
        ,User::sampleName()
        ,User::sampleEmail()
        ,User::sampleRoles()
        ,User::sampleProfile()
        );
    }
}

// This is a autogenerated file:Profile

class Profile {
    private int $age; // json:age Required
    private bool $active; // json:active Required

    /**
     * @param int $age
     * @param bool $active
     */
    public function __construct(int $age, bool $active) {
        $this->age = $age;
        $this->active = $active;
    }

    /**
     * @param int $value
     * @throws Exception
     * @return int
     */
    public static function fromAge(int $value): int {
        return $value; /*int*/
    }

    /**
     * @throws Exception
     * @return int
     */
    public function toAge(): int {
        if (Profile::validateAge($this->age))  {
            return $this->age; /*int*/
        }
        throw new Exception('never get to this Profile::age');
    }

    /**
     * @param int
     * @return bool
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public static function validateAge(int $value): bool {
        if (!is_integer($value)) {
            throw new Exception("Attribute Error:Profile::age");
        }
        return true;
    }

    /**
     * @throws Exception
     * @return int
     */
    public function getAge(): int {
        if (Profile::validateAge($this->age))  {
            return $this->age;
        }
        throw new Exception('never get to getAge Profile::age');
    }

    /**
     * @return int
     */
    public static function sampleAge(): int {
        return 31; /*31:age*/
    }

    /**
     * @param bool $value
     * @throws Exception
     * @return bool
     */
    public static function fromActive(bool $value): bool {
        return $value; /*bool*/
    }

    /**
     * @throws Exception
     * @return bool
     */
    public function toActive(): bool {
        if (Profile::validateActive($this->active))  {
            return $this->active; /*bool*/
        }
        throw new Exception('never get to this Profile::active');
    }

    /**
     * @param bool
     * @return bool
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public static function validateActive(bool $value): bool {
        if (!is_bool($value)) {
            throw new Exception("Attribute Error:Profile::active");
        }
        return true;
    }

    /**
     * @throws Exception
     * @return bool
     */
    public function getActive(): bool {
        if (Profile::validateActive($this->active))  {
            return $this->active;
        }
        throw new Exception('never get to getActive Profile::active');
    }

    /**
     * @return bool
     */
    public static function sampleActive(): bool {
        return true; /*32:active*/
    }

    /**
     * @throws Exception
     * @return bool
     */
    public function validate(): bool {
        return Profile::validateAge($this->age)
        || Profile::validateActive($this->active);
    }

    /**
     * @return stdClass
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public function to(): stdClass  {
        $out = new stdClass();
        $out->{'age'} = $this->toAge();
        $out->{'active'} = $this->toActive();
        return $out;
    }

    /**
     * @param stdClass $obj
     * @return Profile
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public static function from(stdClass $obj): Profile {
        return new Profile(
         Profile::fromAge($obj->{'age'})
        ,Profile::fromActive($obj->{'active'})
        );
    }

    /**
     * @return Profile
     */
    public static function sample(): Profile {
        return new Profile(
         Profile::sampleAge()
        ,Profile::sampleActive()
        );
    }
}
